content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: webhook_verify ∧ timestamp_skew ∧ edge_reject
P: valid_webhook_pass ∧ provider_skew_allowed ∧ reg_test
V: "300" ∧ "401" ∧ abs_now_ts
A: widen_skew ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: min_fix.
Constraints: webhook_verify and timestamp_skew and edge_reject.
Plan: valid_webhook_pass and provider_skew_allowed and reg_test.
Verify: "300" and "401" and abs_now_ts.
Answer target: widen_skew and add_reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
P: issue_boundary_loop ∧ need_exact_grace
V: grace_lt_"24h"⇒allow ∧ grace_ge_"24h"⇒"402" ∧ no_reenter

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Plan: issue_boundary_loop and need_exact_grace.
Verify: grace_lt_"24h" implies allow and grace_ge_"24h" implies "402" and no_reenter.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: choose_arch
C: team=9 ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ ops=platform_plus_sec ∧ traffic=steady
P: modular_monolith ∧ single_db ∧ clear_modules ∧ async_jobs ∧ compliance_ready
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ low_ops_burden ∧ audit_friendly
A: ship_monolith ∧ enforce_module_boundaries ∧ use_postgres ∧ defer_microservices

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team:"6" ∧ ddl:"9 weeks" ∧ store:"PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ postgres_queue ∧ async_workers ∧ short_why
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ low_ops
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_path_traversal
C: user_input ∧ "download" ∧ no_sanitization
P: detect_".." ∧ normalize_path ∧ enforce_basedir
V: reject_traversal ∧ allowlist_files ∧ test_malicious_input
A: patch_handler ∧ validate_path ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_path_traversal.
Constraints: user_input and "download" and no_sanitization.
Plan: detect_".." and normalize_path and enforce_basedir.
Verify: reject_traversal and allowlist_files and test_malicious_input.
Answer target: patch_handler and validate_path and audit_logs.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input_concat
P: injection_risk ∧ unvalidated_sort
V: allowlist_sort_columns ∧ parameterize_query ∧ reject_unknown
A: whitelist_columns ∧ param_binding ∧ test_malicious_sort

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sql_injection.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input_concat.
Plan: injection_risk and unvalidated_sort.
Verify: allowlist_sort_columns and parameterize_query and reject_unknown.
Answer target: whitelist_columns and param_binding and test_malicious_sort.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: has_anchors ∧ preserve_order ∧ minimal_change
P: convert_to ∧ "async" ∧ use ∧ "await" ∧ load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Constraints: has_anchors and preserve_order and minimal_change.
Plan: convert_to and "async" and use and "await" and load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: micro_refactor
C: loadGatewayUser ∧ "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)"
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_forwards_"next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
A: async_await ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_next_err
